name: Chicken Delicious
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole Chicken Breasts, Boned and Halved
10.5 oz Canned Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
10.5 oz Canned Condensed Cream of Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts.
2. Pat dry.
3. Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper, celery salt, and paprika.
4. Place in the slow cooker.
5. Mix the condensed cream of mushroom and cream of celery soups with the sherry.
6. Pour over the chicken breasts.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Cover.
9. Cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours.
10. Serve over hot, fluffy rice.
